74282.subject: Morpho Raises $175M as Janus Henderson Goes Deep on Ethena
74282.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These are the biggest web3 stories today:

* **[Morpho](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/morpho-raises-175m-defi-largest-ever-funding-round)**[ raises $175M ](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/morpho-raises-175m-defi-largest-ever-funding-round)

* **[Janus Henderson](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/janus-henderson-ethena-ena-stake-usde-etp-partnership)**[ takes ENA stake](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/janus-henderson-ethena-ena-stake-usde-etp-partnership)

* **[OKX](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/okx-magnificent-7-stocks-commodities-european-x-perps)**[ adds to  X-Perps lineup](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/okx-magnificent-7-stocks-commodities-european-x-perps)

* **[Citrini ](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/citrini-research-hyperliquid-compelling-investment-buybacks)**[calls Hyperliquid compelling](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/citrini-research-hyperliquid-compelling-investment-buybacks)

* **[Aave](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/aave-proposes-protocol-wide-risk-framework-after-kelpdao-exploit)**[ proposes new risk framework ](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/aave-proposes-protocol-wide-risk-framework-after-kelpdao-exploit)

**[Morpho](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/morpho-raises-175m-defi-largest-ever-funding-round)** closed **[$175 million](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/morpho-raises-175m-defi-largest-ever-funding-round)** — one of DeFi's largest-ever rounds, co-led by Paradigm, a16z Crypto, and Ribbit Capital, with Apollo Funds and VanEck as strategic participants. The round values the lending protocol at $2 billion. A team member said investors bought the public token at market price. Hours later, **[Janus Henderson Investors](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/janus-henderson-ethena-ena-stake-usde-etp-partnership)**, a $480 billion asset manager, disclosed a four-part deal with Ethena: a strategic ENA token stake, USDe deployment as treasury asset, distribution of Ethena's CLO product into Janus's channel, and joint work on exchange-traded instruments for USDe. 

[OKX](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/okx-magnificent-7-stocks-commodities-european-x-perps) listed Magnificent-7 stocks and commodity perps for European users with 24/7 leverage, [Citrini Research](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/citrini-research-hyperliquid-compelling-investment-buybacks), the AI-equities shop whose calls move tech-stock tape, published a long Hyperliquid thesis citing its buyback program.

Not all headlines were bullish: [Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-bitcoin-wont-rally-until-ai-bubble-bursts) published his macro thesis arguing $1.5 trillion of AI debt issuance has absorbed the liquidity crypto needs to rally, and rotated Maelstrom's equity book out of crypto-adjacent positions and into US energy producers. Also, **[Humanity Protocol](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/humanity-protocol-36m-hack-private-key-foundation-laptop)**** **was hacked f

74235.subject: The Nerdy Escorts Cashing In On Silicon Valley’s AI Boom
74235.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/nerdy-escorts-cashing-silicon-valleys-ai-boom-forbes-magazine-l0qoc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st
  
Good evening, 2024 college grad Meida Marek (her online pseudonym) realized AI could soon replace her professional skills. Intelligent and talkative with interests in topics like AI, biohacking and cryptocurrency, she decided to turn that toolkit into a new career—and became an escort. Her specialty is high-end companionship for Silicon Valley’s most online, most technical clients. Here’s why the few women specializing in this are having so much success. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images What To Know About Trump’s Expected Appearance At Tonight’s Knicks Game Trump’s anticipated arrival has heightened security measures so much that ticket holders are asked to arrive two hours early. Joe Raedle via Getty Images How Much Graham Platner, Maine’s Oyster-Farming Senate Candidate, Is Worth The veteran running a tear-down-the-oligarchy campaign leverages his rural upbringing, but the full story of his net worth is complicated.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/nerdy-escorts-cashing-silicon-valleys-ai-boom-forbes-magazine-l0qoc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSxhlHp%2F0Q%2FuDbMsl8cQlPQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3CtEOassm9WYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mq5prife~st-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq5prife-st
Ви отримуєте сповіщення е-поштою від LinkedIn. Інші б

74234.subject: Strategy and BitMine Double Down
74234.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)**[ buys 1,550 BTC for $101M one week after selling 32](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)

* **[BitMine](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)**[ buys 126,971 ETH for $207M, largest weekly buy of 2026](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)

* **[Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)**[ dumps Worldcoin days after pitching its AI-IPO trade](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)

* **[Bybit and Kraken](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-kraken-xstocks-spacex-tokenized-equity-pre-ipo-derivatives-four-venues)**[ add xStocks SpaceX as pre-IPO race reaches four venues](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/bybit-kraken-xstocks-spacex-tokenized-equity-pre-ipo-derivatives-four-venues)

* **[200+ crypto firms](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/200-crypto-firms-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act-galaxy-cuts-passage-odds-60-percent)**[ urge CLARITY Senate vote as Galaxy cuts odds to 60%](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/200-crypto-firms-urge-senate-vote-clarity-act-galaxy-cuts-passage-odds-60-percent)

**[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b)** bought [1,550 bitcoin for $101.3 million between June 1 and 7](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-buys-1550-btc-101m-one-week-after-selling-32-cash-reserve-1b), 50 times the 32 BTC the company sold one week earlier, and pushed its cash reserve to $1 billion. The same Monday, **[BitMine Immersion](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low)** disclosed its [largest weekly purchase of 2026](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/bitmine-buys-126971-eth-207m-1630-average-prices-hit-june-low): 126,971 ETH for $207 million at a $1,630 average, deploying the proceeds of last Thursday's [$300 million STRC-style preferred-stock filing](https://thedefiant.io/newsletter/bitmine-brings-strategy-s-strc-playbook-to-an-eth-treasury). The buy lifts BitMine's treasury to 5.54 million ETH, 4.59% of the circulating supply. Both purchases were funded with capital raised in the prior weeks through instruments designed for exactly this trade: issue paper at one price, deploy it at a lower one.

Across the trade, **[Arthur Hayes](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/arthur-hayes-dumps-worldcoin-days-after-maelstrom-pitched-ai-ipo-trade)** sold his entire Worldcoin position on June 6, completing a weeks-long liquidation across HYPE, NEAR, ZEC, and now WLD — [three days after Maelstrom publicly pitched Worldcoin](https://thed

74230.subject: The Daily Degen - June 8th, 2026
74230.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
74230.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-8th-2026

Happy Monday good frogs! Start of another big week!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.264T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $717.74
Gold: $4,333.90
Silver: $68.17
Oil (WTI): $90.16
US 10Y Treasury: 4.554%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 15
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Important update regarding our friends at @Balancer [ https://substack.com/redirect/abc01fb8-a7b4-4eb0-9b3a-8d135642554c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - who just introduced an extremely cool new development called AutoRange Pools!
As explained in their recent thread [ https://substack.com/redirect/e9269d45-7c3d-4029-8ad2-cacb623e2106?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]:
“AutoRange Pools are live on Balancer...  
Concentrated liquidity with a range that readjusts on its own, a fungible LP position, and no oracle in the loop…”
The gigabrain nature of this development has substantial benefits for DAO’s and treasuries, passive LP’s, protocols, and more!
As the thread continues:
“The same design that makes positions portable keeps the protocol trustless. 
Price comes from the pool’s own trading activity, not an external feed. 
For protocols, that removes an entire attack vector: no feed to manipulate and no oracle in the critical path…”
Learn more in this great article from Balancer’s @tiagohansen_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/861093bb-a36c-4fde-a14a-b75fd3183c0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] (see screenshot of first two paragraphs below!)…
And as always make sure to follow Balancer on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/abc01fb8-a7b4-4eb0-9b3a-8d135642554c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates, and stay tuned as we keep offering updates on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are quite green today. Best-performing top 50 chain on the monthly is Mezo (#50) at +323%. 
Protocols are mostly green today. Best-performing top 50 protocol on the monthly is Sablier (#4) at +40.01%.

Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $1M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Revenue Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at l

>

> *Teamleader  & Invest-specialist*

> <s.sivak@fincloud.sk>gmail.com <http://gmail.com>*
>
> *Dôležité:*
>
> *Obsah informácií v tejto e-mailovej správe je dôverný alebo chránený a je
> určený výhradne vyššie uvedeným adresátom alebo zástupcom. Obsah e-mailovej

> Akákoľvek reprodukcia, prenos materiálu, neoprávnená duplikácia,
> zverejnenie, zverejnenie a zverejnenie obsahu tohto e-mailu akejkoľvek
> tretej strane je prísne zakázané. Ak nie ste uvedeným adresátom alebo jeho
> zástupcom, nemáte právo na získanie informácií, ihneď kontaktujte
> odosielateľa, pošlite mu e-mail (odpovedzte alebo odpovedzte na e-mail) a
> tento e-mail zničte. Ak ste túto e-mailovú správu (vrátane akejkoľvek
> prílohy) dostali omylom, informujte o tom ihneď odosielateľa e-mailom a
> natrvalo odstráňte pôvodný e-mail zo svojho systému. Na informácie alebo
> iné vyhlásenia adresátovi sa vzťahuje právo spoločnosti, ktorej boli

74211.subject: Ebook pomôcka vytvorená z investičných prezentácií na štúdium
74211.body:
Ahojte,

V prílohe vám posielam novo-vytvorenú pomôcku pre vás. Investičný ebook,
ktorý je vytvorený z prezentácií, ktoré sme spolu študovali.

A čo viac - posielam vám SK verziu, EN verziu a UA verziu :)
Tak môžete skontrolovať aj UA verziu, či je to správne / použiteľné... snáď
tam bude čo najmenej prekladateľských chýb.
Prosím vás o kontrolu UA verzie. :)

-- 
S prianím pekného dňa,

*Maroš Sivák*
*InterFin, s.r.o.*
*Teamleader  & Invest-specialist*
*tel: **+421 9 <+421%20910%20684%20619>48 013 833*
*e-mail: **maro <martin.vittek@fincloud.sk>s.sivak.sro@
<s.sivak@fincloud.sk>gmail.com <http://gmail.com>*

*Dôležité:*

*Obsah informácií v tejto e-mailovej správe je dôverný alebo chránený a je
určený výhradne vyššie uvedeným adresátom alebo zástupcom. Obsah e-mailovej
správy je právne záväzný len vtedy, ak bol adresátovi písomne potvrdený.
Akákoľvek reprodukcia, prenos materiálu, neoprávnená duplikácia,
zverejnenie, zverejnenie a zverejnenie obsahu tohto e-mailu akejkoľvek
tretej strane je prísne zakázané. Ak nie ste uvedeným adresátom alebo jeho
zástupcom, nemáte právo na získanie informácií, ihneď kontaktujte
odosielateľa, pošlite mu e-mail (odpovedzte alebo odpovedzte na e-mail) a
tento e-mail zničte. Ak ste túto e-mailovú správu (vrátane akejkoľvek
prílohy) dostali omylom, informujte o tom ihneď odosielateľa e-mailom a
natrvalo odstráňte pôvodný e-mail zo svojho systému. Na informácie alebo
iné vyhlásenia adresátovi sa vzťahuje právo spoločnosti, ktorej boli
poskytnuté, najmä všeobecné obchodné podmienky a prípadne individuálna
dohoda. Dobrovoľne súhlasíte so spracovaním osobných údajov na marketingové
účely v súlade s ustanovením slovenského zákona § 13 ods. 1 písm. a) zákona
č. 18/2018 Z. z. o ochrane osobných údajov a zmene niektorých zákonov
(ďalej len „zákon“). Dokumenty sú k dispozícii nižšie.*
